# `transport/state_ev_share_total_registrations_pct`

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `python -m yen_gov indicator-pages`. Do not hand-edit. -->

**Title**: EV share of total vehicle registrations by state and category  
**One-line**: EVs as a share of total new vehicle registrations in each state, by vehicle category.  
**Last Updated**: 2026-05-15 (auto-generated)  
**Source artifact**: [`datasets/indicators/in/transport/state_ev_share_total_registrations_pct.json`](../../../../datasets/indicators/in/transport/state_ev_share_total_registrations_pct.json)

## Definition

EVs as a share of total new vehicle registrations in each state, by vehicle category. Tracks the pace of fleet electrification. Sourced from MoRTH VAHAN dashboard via NITI Aayog ICED.

## Signature

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Entity kind | `state` |
| Time grain | `fiscal_year` |
| Value kind | `share` |
| Unit | `%` |
| Direction | `higher_is_better` |

| Attribution geography | `where_administered` |
| Implementing authority | `joint` |
| Scale hint | `linear` |
| Chart type | `stacked-trend` |
| Default mode | `percent` |

## Coverage

- **Temporal**: 2000-04..2025-04 (26 periods)
- **Spatial**: India (states + UTs) (35 entities)
- **Rows on disk**: 10,920

## Methodology vintage

MoRTH VAHAN registration database (excludes Telangana for some years; some early-year zero values reflect absent registration tooling, not absent vehicles).
